no_import_evidence: This increment creates Narada proper descriptor/admission records and capability visibility only. It imports no narada-andrey runtime DB, task, inbox, roster, checkpoint, operator-surface, PC-locus, secret, identity-specific, or source-history state. No SQLite mutation, initializer execution, adapter activation, or live MCP registration was performed.

rollback_notes: Remove the task-0002 descriptor files and revert the mcp-surfaces.json entry if this admission is superseded. Preserve ledger/audit entries as superseded evidence. No package files, DBs, runtime registrations, or source Site state were changed.
